creator: handy@physics.montana.edu
text:
I'm trying to figure out how to print Japanese characters to my
printer.  [Any advice would be apprciated.]  Along the way, I'm
upgrading some small things.

Note that the file watanabe_font has changed, which seems strange.
I'm not sure what it's used for here, but the distfile is different
now.  I see a lot of source code there getting loaded into the tree, 
I wonder if that's really the desired goal of this file?
